'''√v-b-sh''' ('''vabasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantise|quantise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantise|quantise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| vabasha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || vabashithi || vabashiji || vabashishi || vabashi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || vabashuthuth || vabashujuj || vabashushush || vabash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || vabashuthu || vabashuju || vabashushu || vabashu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || vabashufuth || vabashufuj || vabashufush || vabashuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || vabashethe || vabasheje || vabasheshe || vabashe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || vabashothoth || vabashojoj || vabashoshosh || vabash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || vabashotho || vabashojo || vabashosho || vabasho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || vabashofoth || vabashofoj || vabashofosh || vabashof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vabashïf || vabashïf || vabashïf || vabashïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vabashïfïf || vabashïfïf || vabashïfïf || vabashïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vabashïf || vabashïf || vabashïf || vabashïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vabashïf || vabashïf || vabashïf || vabashïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || vabashæthæ || vabashæjæ || vabashæshæ || vabashæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || vabashathath || vabashajaj || vabashashash || vabash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || vabashatha || vabashaja || vabashasha || vabasha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || vabashafath || vabashafaj || vabashafash || vabashaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || vabashasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || govabashasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokivabashasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || vabashnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || govabashnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokivabashnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vabashshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || govabashnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokivabashshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || vabashroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || govabashnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokivabashroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || vabashmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || govabashnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokivabashmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || vabashsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || govabashnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokivabashsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || vabashngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || govabashnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokivabashngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || vabashyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || govabashnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokivabashyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || vabashyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || govabashnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokivabashyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || vabashnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || govabashnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokivabashnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || vabashnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || govabashnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokivabashnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || vabashnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || govabashnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokivabashnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || vabashshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || govabashnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokivabashshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || vabashshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || govabashnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokivabashshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vabashshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || govabashnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokivabashshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || vabashronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || govabashnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokivabashronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || vabashroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || govabashnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokivabashroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || vabashromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || govabashnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokivabashromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || vabashmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || govabashnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokivabashmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || vabashmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || govabashnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokivabashmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || vabashmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || govabashnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokivabashmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || vabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || væbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hovabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hovæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohovabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohovæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüvabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüvæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüvabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüvæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïvabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïvæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïvabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïvæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luvabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luvæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluvabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluvæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || livabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || livæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilivabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilivæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kovabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kovæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokovabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokovæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kevabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kevæbæsh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekevabash
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekevæbæsh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
